subject_tmpl: Missed garbage pickup on {STREET} – {DATE}
body_tmpl: Hi, my name is {FIRST} {LAST} and I live at {ADDRESS} on {STREET}. Our garbage was not picked up on {DATE}, which is our scheduled collection day. I had the cart out by 6 a.m. as required. Can you please let me know when a crew will come back for it? This is the second time this has happened in the past month. Thanks.
reply_tmpl: Hi {FIRST}, thanks for reaching out. I've logged your missed pickup and dispatched a return crew for {STREET}. You should see service restored within 24 hours. We apologize for the inconvenience. If the cart is still not emptied by {DATE}, please call us at {PHONE}.

subject_tmpl: Recycling cart not emptied – {STREET} and {CROSS}
body_tmpl: {FIRST} {LAST} here, {ADDRESS}. My blue recycling cart was skipped this past {DATE}. All recyclables were properly sorted — no plastic bags, everything rinsed. My neighbor at {CROSS} was also skipped. Is there a route issue we should know about? Would appreciate a call back at {PHONE}.

subject_tmpl: Bulk item pickup request – {ADDRESS}
body_tmpl: Good morning. I'm {NAME} at {ADDRESS} on {STREET}. I need to schedule a bulk-item pickup. I have an old sofa, a box spring, and a broken chest freezer ready for disposal. I know these can't go out with regular trash. What dates are available this month, and is there any limit on items? Please let me know — I'd like to get this scheduled as soon as possible.
reply_tmpl: Hello {NAME}, bulk pickup for your area is available on {DATE}. Please place items at the curb by 6 a.m. that morning. Up to {NUM} large items are collected per visit at no charge. If you have more, please call {PHONE} to schedule a second pickup.

subject_tmpl: Damaged garbage cart at {ADDRESS}
body_tmpl: My garbage cart lid is cracked and the hinge on the left side is completely broken off. I believe it was damaged during the last pickup — the truck's grabber arm crushed it. I'm at {ADDRESS}, {STREET}. The cart number stenciled on the side is {NUM}. Can I get a replacement or repair? Thank you, {FIRST} {LAST}.

subject_tmpl: Stolen recycling cart – please replace
body_tmpl: Someone has taken my recycling cart from in front of my house at {ADDRESS}. I noticed it missing after {DATE} — I set it out the evening before pickup and by morning it was gone. I've already filed a police report. Can the Village replace the cart? I'm {FIRST} {LAST} and you can reach me at {PHONE}. I need a cart to keep up with my weekly recycling.
reply_tmpl: Hi {FIRST}, I'm sorry to hear about your missing cart. We'll issue a replacement. Please allow {DAYS} business days for delivery. The new cart will be tagged to your address. Let us know if you have any trouble.

subject_tmpl: Request for second recycling cart – {STREET}
body_tmpl: Hi there, I'm writing to request an additional blue recycling cart for my household at {ADDRESS} on {STREET}. Our family of {NUM} fills the current cart every week, sometimes overflowing before pickup day. Is there a fee for a second cart? If so, who should I make payment out to? {FIRST} {LAST}, {PHONE}.
reply_tmpl: Hello {FIRST}, additional recycling carts are available for a one-time fee of {AMOUNT}. Payment can be made at Village Hall or by phone. Once processed, delivery typically takes {DAYS} days. Please reference your account or address {ADDRESS} when paying.

subject_tmpl: Yard waste not picked up – {DATE}
body_tmpl: My yard-waste bags were placed at the curb by 6 a.m. on {DATE}, which I believe is on the schedule. Neither the bags nor the bundled branches were collected. I have {NUM} paper bags and about {NUM} bundles of sticks. Address is {ADDRESS}, {STREET}. Do I need to do anything differently, or is this a missed stop? — {FIRST}

subject_tmpl: When does yard waste season end?
body_tmpl: Hello, I have a quick question. What is the last yard waste pickup date for this fall? I want to make sure I get my last bags out in time before the season ends. I'm on {STREET} near {CROSS}. Also, is there any drop-off location in Bellwood for yard waste after the season wraps up? Thank you. — {NAME}
reply_tmpl: Hi {NAME}, yard waste pickup on the regular schedule ends {DATE} this season. After that date, residents may drop off materials at the Cook County facility on {CROSS}. We'll also post the spring start date on the Village website in early March.

subject_tmpl: Ongoing missed pickups on {STREET} – residents frustrated
body_tmpl: Mayor Okonkwo, I am reaching out as a longtime Bellwood resident on {STREET} near {CROSS}. For the past {DAYS} weeks, garbage has been missed on our block more often than not. We have called Public Works multiple times but are not getting a consistent fix. I have {NUM} neighbors who feel the same way. We pay for this service and expect it to work. Can you please look into this personally?

subject_tmpl: Service disruption – {STREET} corridor, week of {DATE}
body_tmpl: Karen — heads up that we had a truck breakdown on {DATE} that caused missed pickups along {STREET} and parts of {CROSS}. We've already dispatched a make-up crew for tomorrow morning. I've notified residents who called in. Expect a handful more emails to come through the Mayor's inbox. I'll have a full report by end of week. — Frank

subject_tmpl: Recycling contamination notice — what does it mean?
body_tmpl: I received a bright orange tag on my recycling cart after {DATE}'s pickup saying my load was 'contaminated' and not collected. The tag listed plastic bags as the issue. I didn't think I had any bags in there. Can you tell me more specifically what was wrong and whether I can get a pickup now? I don't want to be penalized again. — {FIRST} {LAST}, {ADDRESS}
reply_tmpl: Hi {FIRST}, contamination tags are issued when prohibited materials are found — the most common is plastic bags, which jam our sorting equipment. Please remove any bags and place only loose recyclables in the cart. You may put the cart back out on your next scheduled day, {DATE}, and it will be collected normally.

subject_tmpl: Holiday pickup schedule question
body_tmpl: Hi, is garbage pickup still happening on {DATE}? It's a holiday week and I wasn't sure if service is delayed. My normal day is {DATE} and I don't want to leave the cart out unnecessarily. Just need to know if it's shifted by a day. Thanks, {NAME}, {STREET}.
reply_tmpl: Hi {NAME}, due to the {DATE} holiday, collection on your route is delayed by one day. Please place your cart out the following morning instead. Regular service resumes the week after.

subject_tmpl: Garbage truck leaking fluid on {STREET}
body_tmpl: This morning around {TIME} I watched the garbage truck leave a trail of dark liquid down {STREET} between {CROSS} and {ADDRESS}. It's a long streak — maybe half a block. I don't know if it's oil, hydraulic fluid, or garbage leachate, but it smells terrible and I'm worried about kids and pets walking through it. Who handles cleanup for something like this?

subject_tmpl: Large appliance pickup – refrigerator and dryer
body_tmpl: I need to dispose of an old refrigerator and a clothes dryer at {ADDRESS} on {STREET}. I understand appliances require a special pickup. Do I need to get the Freon removed from the fridge first, or does the Village handle that? And is there a fee? Please advise. My name is {FIRST} {LAST} and I'm available at {PHONE}.
reply_tmpl: Hello {FIRST}, appliances containing refrigerants must have them removed by a certified technician before we can pick them up — this is a federal requirement. Once you have a certification tag from a licensed HVAC tech, call {PHONE} and we'll schedule a free large-appliance pickup within {DAYS} days.

subject_tmpl: Extra trash bags on heavy cleanup week – will they be taken?
body_tmpl: We're doing a big cleanout at {ADDRESS} this week and will have extra garbage beyond what fits in the cart — probably {NUM} additional tied bags placed next to it. Are those collected if they're bagged and at the curb? Or do I need to call ahead? I don't want to get a violation notice. Thanks in advance. — {FIRST}

subject_tmpl: Cart not returned to property after pickup – {DATE}
body_tmpl: After the garbage truck came through on {DATE}, my cart was left in the middle of the street at {ADDRESS} instead of being returned to the curb. A car clipped it and now there's a crack in the base. This has happened before. Please make sure your crews return carts to the curbside after emptying. I'd also like to request a cart replacement given the damage. — {FIRST} {LAST}
reply_tmpl: Hi {FIRST}, I'm sorry about that. Our policy is to return carts to the edge of the curb after emptying. I'll address this with the route supervisor. I'm also authorizing a replacement cart for {ADDRESS} — please allow {DAYS} days for delivery.

subject_tmpl: Yard waste bags vs. carts – what's the rule?
body_tmpl: I've been using paper yard-waste bags but my neighbor told me the Village switched to carts only this year. Is that right? I have about {NUM} bags of leaves ready to go out for pickup on {DATE}. Will they still be collected in bags, or do I need to request a yard-waste cart first? I don't want to miss the pickup window. Address: {ADDRESS}, {STREET}. — {NAME}

subject_tmpl: Missed recycling – third time this month – {STREET}
body_tmpl: I am beyond frustrated. My recycling at {ADDRESS} on {STREET} has been skipped three times in the past four weeks. Dates: {DATE}, then again {DATE}, and again this past Friday. I've called and emailed each time. I sort carefully and my cart is always out by 5:30 a.m. Something is clearly wrong with the route. I want a formal response telling me what is being done to fix this.
reply_tmpl: Dear {FIRST} {LAST}, I sincerely apologize for the repeated missed collections at {ADDRESS}. I've reviewed your address in our routing system and found an error that was causing your stop to be skipped. This has been corrected. A make-up crew will service your cart on {DATE}. Going forward, your route day is confirmed as every {DATE}. Please contact me directly at {PHONE} if you experience any further issues.

subject_tmpl: Electronic waste disposal – where do I take it?
body_tmpl: Hi, I have an old TV, a desktop computer, and two monitors that I need to recycle properly. Does Bellwood have an e-waste drop-off day or location? I saw a flyer once but can't find the info online. My address is {ADDRESS} on {STREET}. I want to make sure these items are disposed of legally and don't end up in a landfill. — {FIRST} {LAST}
reply_tmpl: Hello {FIRST}, Bellwood partners with Cook County for electronics recycling. The next drop-off event is {DATE} at {ADDRESS}. Accepted items include TVs, computers, monitors, printers, and most electronics. There is no charge for residents. Check the Village website for updates closer to the date.

subject_tmpl: Garbage cart too small – need larger size
body_tmpl: My current garbage cart is the small 65-gallon size and it's simply not enough for my household. We overflow it nearly every week. I'd like to upgrade to the 96-gallon cart. How do I request a swap? Is there an extra charge? I'm at {ADDRESS} and my account should be under {LAST}. Thank you.

subject_tmpl: Neighbor's trash left out all week – {STREET}
body_tmpl: I'd like to report a property at {ADDRESS} on {STREET} where garbage carts and loose bags have been sitting at the curb since at least {DATE} — well past the allowed time. There's also a mattress and some furniture stacked in the front yard. It's attracting pests. Can a code officer please inspect? My name is {FIRST} {LAST}.
reply_tmpl: Hi {FIRST}, thank you for reporting this. I've opened case {CASE} and an officer will inspect the property at {ADDRESS} within {DAYS} business days. You'll receive a follow-up once the case is resolved.

subject_tmpl: Garbage pickup time changed – now too early
body_tmpl: For years my street ({STREET} near {CROSS}) was collected around 10 or 11 in the morning. Recently the truck has been coming before 7 a.m. I work nights and putting the cart out at 5 a.m. is really difficult for me. Has the route time changed permanently? Is there any flexibility? — {FIRST}, {ADDRESS}

subject_tmpl: Christmas tree pickup – when and how?
body_tmpl: When will Christmas tree pickup begin in Bellwood this year? I have one full tree and a few wreaths to put out. Do they need to have all the ornaments and tinsel removed? And is there a limit per household? I'm at {ADDRESS} on {STREET}. I don't want to miss the window and get stuck paying to haul it myself. — {NAME}
reply_tmpl: Hi {NAME}, Christmas tree pickup runs from {DATE} through {DATE}. Place trees at the curb — no bags, no tinsel, no ornaments. Wreaths with wire frames are not accepted. The limit is {NUM} trees per household. Trees will be chipped for mulch.

subject_tmpl: Bulk pickup – mattress and bed frame
body_tmpl: I need to dispose of a queen mattress, a box spring, and a metal bed frame at {ADDRESS}. Are all three items accepted on bulk pickup day? I've seen conflicting info about metal items. Also, do I need to wrap the mattress? Please let me know the next available date for my area. — {FIRST} {LAST}, {PHONE}

subject_tmpl: Thank you – quick response on missed pickup complaint
body_tmpl: Mayor Okonkwo, I just wanted to say thank you. I emailed about a missed pickup on {STREET} last week and a crew was at my house within {DAYS} hours. I really appreciated the fast follow-through. It's nice to know the Village actually listens. Keep up the good work. — {FIRST} {LAST}, {ADDRESS}
reply_tmpl: Thank you so much for taking the time to write, {FIRST}. I'll make sure your kind words reach the Public Works team — they work hard every day to keep Bellwood clean. We're always here if you need us.

subject_tmpl: Sanitation conditions at {ADDRESS} – rodent concern
body_tmpl: Frank — I received a rodent complaint tied to an overflowing garbage situation at {ADDRESS} on {STREET}. Resident {NAME} has had repeated missed pickups and bagged overflow trash has been sitting for {DAYS} days. We're seeing rodent activity per my inspection on {DATE}. Can you prioritize a pickup ASAP and also look at whether the route scheduling is the root cause? I'll follow up with a nuisance notice to the property owner if conditions aren't resolved by {DATE}. — Priya
reply_tmpl: Priya — got it. Dispatching a crew to {ADDRESS} first thing tomorrow. I'll also pull the route history to see if there's a pattern. — Frank

subject_tmpl: Recycling pickup day change – not notified
body_tmpl: My recycling was changed from Thursdays to Wednesdays at some point, but I was never notified. I missed two pickups as a result. I only found out when a neighbor told me. Can you make sure I get notified of any future schedule changes? My address is {ADDRESS} on {STREET}. Email is fine. I'm {FIRST} {LAST}.

subject_tmpl: Missed garbage – just moved to {STREET}
body_tmpl: Hi, I recently moved to {ADDRESS} on {STREET} as of {DATE}. I put my garbage cart out this past week and it wasn't picked up. My neighbors on both sides had theirs taken. I'm wondering if my address hasn't been added to the route yet since I'm a new resident. Can you confirm my pickup day and make sure the address is in the system? — {FIRST} {LAST}, {PHONE}
reply_tmpl: Welcome to Bellwood, {FIRST}! It looks like your address wasn't yet active in our routing system. I've added {ADDRESS} now. Your regular pickup day is {DATE}. A make-up collection will come by within {DAYS} business days.

subject_tmpl: Composting program – does Bellwood offer one?
body_tmpl: Hi there. I've been composting at home for years but my yard is too small to keep a compost pile anymore. Does Bellwood offer any municipal composting collection or a drop-off program? I'm generating about {NUM} pounds of food scraps per week that I'd rather not landfill. I'm on {STREET} near {CROSS}. Any information you have would be helpful. — {NAME}

subject_tmpl: Garbage piled in alley behind {STREET} – not ours
body_tmpl: There's a large pile of garbage in the alley behind {STREET} near {CROSS} that's been there since at least {DATE}. It includes broken furniture, loose bags, and construction debris. None of the nearby residents claim it — looks like it was dumped. There's a strong odor and I've seen rats around it. Who should I contact to get this cleaned up?
reply_tmpl: Thank you for reporting this. I've logged a complaint and will have a Public Works crew and a code officer inspect the alley behind {STREET} by {DATE}. If we can determine who dumped the material, a citation will be issued. In the meantime, please avoid contact with the debris.

subject_tmpl: Second recycling cart – two-flat at {ADDRESS}
body_tmpl: I own a two-flat at {ADDRESS} on {STREET} with two units. Each tenant generates recycling but we only have one cart. Can I request a second one? Both units are residential. The upstairs tenant is {NAME} and I'm the owner, {FIRST} {LAST}. Happy to pay any applicable fee. Is this handled through Public Works or through another department?
reply_tmpl: Hi {FIRST}, two-flat properties are eligible for a second cart. The fee is {AMOUNT}, billed once. Please stop by Village Hall with proof of ownership or call {PHONE} to process by phone. We'll deliver the cart to {ADDRESS} within {DAYS} days of payment.

subject_tmpl: Garbage truck damaged my parked car on {DATE}
body_tmpl: The garbage truck that came down {STREET} on {DATE} swiped my parked car and cracked the rear tail light and dented the bumper. I have a witness and photos. The truck was on {STREET} between {CROSS} and {ADDRESS} around {TIME}. I need to file a damage claim. Who do I contact at the Village, and what information do you need from me? — {FIRST} {LAST}, {PHONE}

subject_tmpl: Leaf collection schedule for {STREET}
body_tmpl: Can you tell me the leaf vacuum pickup schedule for {STREET} this fall? I have a large oak tree and generate a lot of leaves. I want to make sure I get them to the curb in time and not bag everything. What are the rules about how the leaves need to be piled — can they be next to the curb strip or does the pile need to be between the curb and sidewalk? — {NAME}, {ADDRESS}
reply_tmpl: Hi {NAME}, leaf pickup on {STREET} is scheduled for the week of {DATE}. Please rake leaves to the terrace between the curb and sidewalk — not onto the street surface. Leaves mixed with sticks, trash, or bagged materials will not be vacuumed. Check the Village website for any weather-related delays.

subject_tmpl: Missed garbage on {DATE} – snow day or route issue?
body_tmpl: We got about {NUM} inches of snow on {DATE} and our garbage was not picked up that day. I understand there may be weather delays, but I haven't seen any communication from the Village about a makeup day. My cart has now been full for {DAYS} days. Can you please let me know when service will resume on {STREET}? — {FIRST} {LAST}, {ADDRESS}
reply_tmpl: Hi {FIRST}, we suspended collection on {DATE} due to unsafe road conditions. Make-up service for {STREET} is scheduled for {DATE}. We apologize for the delay and the lack of communication — we'll work on better notifications for future weather disruptions.

subject_tmpl: Hazardous waste disposal – paint, batteries, chemicals
body_tmpl: I'm doing a big garage cleanout at {ADDRESS} and have accumulated old paint cans, car batteries, motor oil, and some aerosol cans. I know I can't put these in the regular garbage. Does Bellwood have a household hazardous waste event coming up, or is there a year-round facility I can use? Please advise. — {FIRST}, {STREET}
reply_tmpl: Hi {FIRST}, Cook County operates a household hazardous waste drop-off at {ADDRESS} in {CROSS}. Hours are {TIME} on select Saturdays. Motor oil can also be dropped off at participating auto parts stores. Check the County website for the full accepted-materials list and upcoming dates.

subject_tmpl: Cart replacement costs – budget line item for {DATE} quarter
body_tmpl: David — we replaced {NUM} carts this quarter due to damage and theft, at an average cost of {AMOUNT} per unit. That puts us at roughly {AMOUNT} over budget for cart replacements year to date. I'd like to discuss whether we should adjust the Q{NUM} allocation or pursue a bulk-purchase contract for next year. Can we set up a call this week? — Frank

subject_tmpl: Broken wheel on garbage cart – repair or replace?
body_tmpl: One of the wheels on my garbage cart fell off after the last pickup. I think the axle pin broke. The cart still technically works but it's very hard to roll, especially on the parkway. The cart number is {NUM} and my address is {ADDRESS} on {STREET}. Is there a repair process or do I just get a new one? — {NAME}, {PHONE}
reply_tmpl: Hi {NAME}, minor cart repairs aren't typically done in the field. Given the wheel issue, we'll swap that cart for a new one. A driver will drop a replacement at {ADDRESS} on {DATE}. Please leave the damaged cart at the curb that morning for pickup.

subject_tmpl: Recycling overflowed – can I set out extra bags alongside cart?
body_tmpl: We've had a hectic few weeks at {ADDRESS} and our recycling is overflowing the cart. Can I set out additional clear bags of recyclables next to the cart on {DATE}? I want to make sure it actually gets collected and I don't get a warning tag. Everything is properly sorted — cardboard broken down, cans rinsed. — {FIRST} {LAST}

subject_tmpl: No garbage service set up yet – new construction home
body_tmpl: I moved into a newly constructed home at {ADDRESS} on {STREET} on {DATE}. I have not received any cart and garbage has not been picked up from my address at all. I'm not sure if this was supposed to be set up through the Village or the builder. Can you check the account and get me started? I can be reached at {PHONE}. — {FIRST} {LAST}
reply_tmpl: Hi {FIRST}, new construction addresses require a service activation request. I'm opening your account now for {ADDRESS}. Your first scheduled pickup day will be {DATE}. A garbage cart and recycling cart will be delivered by {DATE}. Welcome to Bellwood!

subject_tmpl: Garbage crew damaged my landscaping on {STREET}
body_tmpl: Mayor Okonkwo — the garbage truck crew drove partially onto my lawn at {ADDRESS} on {DATE} while turning around on {STREET}. They tore up about {NUM} square feet of sod near my parkway tree. No one from the crew acknowledged it or left a note. I'd like the Village to cover the cost of sod repair, which I'm estimating at around {AMOUNT}. Who should I be in contact with?
reply_tmpl: Dear {FIRST} {LAST}, I'm sorry this happened. Please send your documentation and repair estimate to my assistant Tina at Village Hall and we'll route it to the appropriate department for review. We take property damage claims seriously and will follow up within {DAYS} business days.

subject_tmpl: Spring cleanup – brush and branch bundle rules
body_tmpl: It's that time of year and I have a lot of branches to put out from winter storm damage. What are the rules for bundling? I've heard they need to be tied, no longer than {NUM} feet, and under a certain diameter. How many bundles can I put out per week? I'm at {ADDRESS} on {STREET}. Also, do branches go on the same day as yard waste bags? — {NAME}
reply_tmpl: Hi {NAME}, branches and brush must be bundled with twine, no longer than 4 feet, and no thicker than 4 inches in diameter. Up to {NUM} bundles are collected per week. They are picked up on the same day as yard waste. Extra bundles beyond the limit require a call to schedule a separate pickup.

subject_tmpl: Commercial waste pickup missed – {BIZ} at {ADDRESS}
body_tmpl: This is {NAME} at {BIZ}, {ADDRESS} on St. Charles Rd. Our commercial dumpster was not serviced on {DATE} and it's now completely full. We have kitchen waste and it's becoming a health issue. Our contract shows pickup on {DATE} each week. Who do I call to get this resolved today? We cannot have an overflowing dumpster with customers coming in.
reply_tmpl: Hi {NAME}, commercial accounts are serviced through our contracted hauler. Please call them directly at {PHONE} to report the missed pickup and request emergency service. If they're unresponsive, let me know and I'll escalate. I've also flagged your complaint internally.

subject_tmpl: Recycling cart lid won't close – won't fit in truck arm?
body_tmpl: My recycling cart lid is warped and won't close flat anymore — it sticks up a few inches on one side. Last week the automated arm on the truck couldn't get a good grip and left the cart without emptying it. Cart number is {NUM}, address {ADDRESS} on {STREET}. Is a warped lid grounds for a replacement? — {FIRST}
reply_tmpl: Hi {FIRST}, a lid that prevents automated pickup definitely qualifies for a replacement. I'll put in a work order to swap cart {NUM} at {ADDRESS}. Expect a new cart within {DAYS} days. In the meantime, you can call {PHONE} to arrange a manual pickup for your next scheduled day.

subject_tmpl: Sanitation service suspended during water main repair?
body_tmpl: Hi, I received a notice that water main work on {STREET} near {CROSS} will be going on from {DATE} to {DATE}. Will garbage pickup be disrupted during that time? I want to know if I should hold off putting my cart out or if service will still run as normal. Any heads up would be helpful. — {FIRST} {LAST}, {ADDRESS}
reply_tmpl: Hi {FIRST}, garbage collection on {STREET} will continue during the water main work, though the truck may come at a different time of day. Please have your cart out by 6 a.m. as usual. If there's a day where access is blocked, we'll send a follow-up notification and reschedule that stop.

subject_tmpl: Compliment for your sanitation crew – {STREET}
body_tmpl: Hi, I just wanted to pass along a compliment. The crew that services {STREET} on {DATE} has been excellent — always on time, they return the carts neatly, and they even picked up a few loose cans that had spilled without being asked. It's a small thing but it really makes a difference. Please let them know they're appreciated. — {FIRST} {LAST}, {ADDRESS}
reply_tmpl: Thank you for the kind words, {FIRST}! I'll make sure to share this with the crew and their supervisor. It means a lot to hear positive feedback — our team works hard in all weather conditions and it truly motivates them.
